_note: Cambridge 19 is a 138-page scan with no text layer, so every page is read by OCR (scripts/ocr_pages.py). 319 of its 320 questions come out of that. This file carries the one neither engine could read: the cell 'a 10 ................ tart' in Test 3's Listening Part 1 table, which Windows OCR returned as 'Bakery  a brown loaf  tart' and rapidocr as 'Bakery' and 'tart' — the 'a 10' is simply absent from both. Transcribed from the page image; the answer is the parser's own, out of the key on page 55.

questions.question_text: Shopping — Bakery, Other ideas: a ________ tart
questions.group_instruction: Complete the table below. Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.
